hero.line1: Ligtas a pagmemensahe para kaninu man, nun kayas man — at
hero.sub: Magkuha kang libre a secure phone number ba kang mag-call at mag-text king mabilugan a yatu king Wi-Fi o data. Mag-enjoy kang end-to-end encryption, disappearing messages, at HD voice/video calling — at built-in tools a makatulong keka para manatiling konektadu king aliwang bansa.

upgrade.title: I-upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Magsimula king libre at ad-supported plan. Munta ad-free gamit ing Plus, o luwan ing full power features gamit ing Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Pili kang app plan, magdagdag data packs para keka, o mi-share data king family — ngan king metung a lugal.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Magsimula king libre at ad-supported plan. Munta ad-free gamit ing Plus, o luwan ing full power features gamit ing Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Magdagdag global eSIM data ba magpatuloy ing Chatforia nung alayu ka king Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Mag-gawa shared data pool para king family mu at i-manage ing usage ning balang metung.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Luwan ing power features & i-remove ing ads.

free.title: Free
free.desc: Magsimula mag-mensahe libre. Mabuti nung susubukan mu pa ing Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 at group chat, at voice at video calls
features.media: I-share photos, voice messages, at short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies at instant translation (fair use)

features.ads: Libre forever at atiu la ing ads king app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Amin a essentials, alang ads. Mabuti para king aldo-aldo a pagmemensahe at calling.

features.allFree: Amin a atiu king Free, alang ads

features.history: Mas makaba a message history (anggan 6 months)
features.support: Mas mabilis a support nung may mali

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: Ing full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, at priority support.

features.themes: Luwan ing amin a premium color themes at app customizations

features.support: Priority support nung kailangan mu talaga

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Mag-save pa nung yearly ing bayad — atiu la ing extra color themes, AI tools, at priority support.

features.allPremium: Amin a atiu king Premium Monthly — atiu la ing extra color themes
features.annualBilling: Bayad metung a beses king banwa
features.bestFor: Mabuti para king power users, remote workers, at mabibigat a travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: I-save 30% gamit annual — magpatuloy king login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Bayad upfront. Maliari mung i-cancel kapan man. Alang hidden fees.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, at AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Bayad upfront. Maliari mung i-cancel kapan man. Alang hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Magdagdag global data ba magpatuloy ing Chatforia nung alayu ka king Wi-Fi. Ing presyo mi-adjust automatically ayon king kekang bansa at currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pili kang metung a one-time global data pack ba magpatuloy ing Chatforia nung malayu ka king Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: E mi bebenta data packs king babo ning 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: High-speed data para king mabigat a gamit
features.throttle: Maaaring maghinay ing bilis pagkatapos ning mabigat a gamit

disclaimer.devices: Ing eSIM data packs kailangan eSIM-compatible at unlocked a device. Ing availability miiba ayon king phone model, carrier, at bansa. Ing coverage at bilis miiba ayon king rehiyon.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Atiu 3 GB high-speed data — mabuti para king magaan a pagmemensahe at pana-panahong calls.
small.bestFor: Short trips, magaan a pagmemensahe, at pana-panahong calls

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Atiu 5 GB high-speed data para king trips, commuting, at regular VoIP calls.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, at maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Atiu 10 GB high-speed data para king mabigat a chat, calls, at video king Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Mabigat a chat, calls, video, at hotspot use
large.aria: Bili Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: I-compare ing eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Ing tunay a data usage miiba ayon nung nanu ing gamit mu king Chatforia (voice, video, media, at aliwang apps king phone mu).

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: I-share metung a data pool king kekang family. Metung a bill, maragul a Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Atiu 20 GB shared high-speed data — mabuti para 2–3 magaan a users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Atiu 40 GB shared high-speed data — mabuti para 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Atiu 80 GB shared high-speed data — para king power families a laging online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool para king family mu
feature.manage: I-manage ing limit para king balang member
feature.fairUse: Subject king fair-use policy at local limits

family.disclaimer: Ing family packs mag-gawa o mag-top up metung a shared data pool. Maliari mung i-invite at i-remove members kapan man.
family.footnote: Ing family packs mi-share metung a data pool king linked Chatforia accounts. Ing availability at limits miiba ayon king kekang bansa at local regulations.

why.title: Bakit magpalipat king Chatforia
why.subtitle: Ing Chatforia bibigyan ka real phone number, smart translation, at malinaw a dalan ba maging ad-free nung ready na ka.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Mas magaan a ads king Free, simple Plus upgrade nung ready na ka, at Premium tools a alang king TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, at built-in translation imbes na daan a call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Mag-text king tunay a phone numbers — ali lang aliwang app users — at atiu la ing AI at status. Mabuti nung manibat ka king apps anti TextFree o TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ing comparison ayon king publicly available information at maaaring miiba king panaun. Ing aliwang free-texting apps anti TextFree o TextMe karaniwan aliwa lang king TextNow.

free.a: Wa. Ing Free plan atiu ing Chatforia number, calling, at pagmemensahe at atiu la ing ads. Maliari kang manatili king Free anggang buri mu, o i-upgrade ba i-remove ing ads at luwan ing aliwang features.

plusPremium.q: Nanu ing kaibahan ning Plus at Premium?
plusPremium.a: Ing Plus i-remove ing ads at papaghabain ing message history — perpekto para king aldo-aldo a gamit. Ing Premium magdagdag extra customization, AI tools para rewrites at replies, at priority support para king mabigat a users.

esim.q: Ninu ing lugal a gagana ing eSIM data packs?
esim.a: Ing Chatforia Mobile gagamit global eSIM coverage. Ing availability miiba ayon king kekang bansa at device. Makita mu ing supported options nung i-activate mu king app.

cancel.q: Maliari kung i-cancel o i-change ing plans kapan man?
cancel.a: Wa. Maliari mung i-manage o i-cancel ing subscription mu manibat king billing page king app. Ing changes maging epektibo king katapusan ning kekang current billing period.

family.q: Nanu ing gamit ning Family packs?
family.a: Ing family packs mag-gawa shared data pool king maragul a Chatforia accounts. Metung a tau ing magbayad, at maliari mung i-invite o i-remove members at i-set limit kada tau.

gettingStarted.title: Magsimula
gettingStarted.subtitle: Bayu ka pa king Chatforia? Ini ing mabilis a gabay ba maging produktibo ka king pilan a minuto.

alert.text: Tutubu ini nga gabay nung mag-launch kami bayung features. Nung alang nanu, paki sabi mi king

section2.title: 2) Magsimula mag-mensahe
section2.item1: Mag-gawa DM o Group at i-send ing kekang mumunang message.
section2.item2: Gamitan ing instant translation ba mag-chat king 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Subukan ing disappearing messages at read receipts king Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Munta pa
section3.item1: Maliari kang i-upgrade king paid plan kapan man king app.
section3.item2: Nung naka-sign in ka na, maliari mung i-link aliwang devices at i-set up encrypted backups manibat king Settings king app.

account.q: Nanu ing dapat kung gawan ba mag-gawa o mag-recover account?
account.a: I-download ing app o gamitan ing web, pindutin “Create account”, i-verify ing email/phone. Ba mag-recover, gamitan “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Wa. Ing messages at calls end-to-end encrypted by default. Ikaw at ing recipient lang maliaring magbasa.

translate.q: Nanu ing gamit ning instant translation?
translate.a: I-enable ing “Auto-translate” king Settings → Appearance & Language. Mi-translate kami on-device nung supported, nung ali king secure APIs at minimal metadata.

contact.a: I-contact mi king support@chatforia.com. I-lagay ing screenshots at kekang app version.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.errorSend: E mi mepadala. Paki email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Ini nga Privacy Policy i-explain nung nanu ing gamit ning Chatforia (“we”, “us”) king pangolekta, gamit, at pag-share information nung gagamitan mu ing kekami apps at services. I-design mi ing Chatforia ba mababa ing data a mi-akses.

infoWeCollect.title: Information a mi-kolekta
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) ba mag-gawa at ligtas ing account mu.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) end-to-end encrypted; e mi maliaring basain.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage anti crash logs, device type, o coarse analytics ba i-improve ing performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers at SMS
sms.body: Nung buri mung ibie ing mobile phone number, gamitan mi ini ba i-enable features anti account verification, login alerts, at user-to-user messaging via SMS nung supported. Maaaring magpadala kami transactional SMS messages tungkol king kekang account at activity king Chatforia. Maliari mung i-opt out kapan man king pagtanggap SMS nung mag-reply ka king supported opt-out keyword (anti “STOP”) o nung i-change ing notification preferences mu king app. E mi bebenta ing phone number mu o gagamitan king aliwang marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Magdagdag kang recipient king babo ba magsimula…

howWeUse.title: Nanu ing gamit ning information
howWeUse.provide: Ibigay at ligtas ing service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Pag-share
sharing.body: E mi bebenta personal data. Maaaring mi-share limited data king processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) king ilalim ning strict contracts.

rights.title: Ing kekang karapatan
rights.body: Ayon king kekang rehiyon (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), maliari kang mag-request access, correction, deletion, o opt-out king aliwang processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: Ing mi-store lang kailangan ba ma-operahan ing service at gamitan industry-standard security. Ing E2E content e maliaring i-decrypt ning mi.

children.title: Anak
children.body: Ing Chatforia ali ya para king anak king babo ning 13 (o ayon king kekang local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: I-post mi ing updates keni at i-revise ing “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Nung gagamitan mu ing Chatforia ma-agree ka king Terms a ini. Nung ali ka ma-agree, alang gamitan ing service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Ibigay ing accurate info at panatili ligtas ing credentials mu.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Ikaw ing responsable king activity king kekang account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Alang illegal, abusive, o infringing content; alang spam o automated abuse.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Maliari ming i-suspend/terminate nung may violation.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: Nung bibie ka mobile phone number, ma-agree ka na magpadala kami SMS messages tungkol king kekang account at gamit ning service, anti login alerts, security notifications, at messages tungkol king conversations a i-simula o i-participate mu. E mi gagamitan SMS para promotional o marketing messages nung alang explicit consent mu. Maaaring mag-apply ing standard message at data rates. Maliari mung i-opt out king SMS kapan man nung mag-reply ka king supported opt-out keyword (e.g., “STOP”) o nung i-update ing notification settings mu king app.

yourContent.title: Ing kekang content
yourContent.body: Panatili mu ing karapatan king kekang content. Ibigay mu kekami ing kailangan a karapatan ba ma-operahan ing service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Ing service “as is” at alang warranties. King pinakamalawak a law, ing Chatforia ali liable king indirect o consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: Maaaring i-update mi ing terms; nung gagamitan mu pa pagkatapos ning changes ma-agree ka na.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Ing Chatforia e bebenta personal information. Ing California residents maliari pa ring mag-submit request king ilalim ning CPRA gamit ing button king babo.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Ing Chatforia gagamit minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). E mi gagamitan third-party ads cookies. I-manage ing cookies gamit ing browser settings mu.

accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Flash screen nung may incoming call
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Mabilis a malino a flash nung may tumatawag.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: I-store ciphertext lang king server. I-disable ing AI/Translate at moderation previews.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Hanap ayon alias, name, username, o phone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Pilan a mabilis a paraan ba magsimula.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: I-share ing invite link mu ba magsimula agad mag-chat.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Manatiling konektadu king dalan gamit ing Chatforia para iOS at Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Manatiling synced ing kekang messages king web at mobile.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Mag-meet kang bayung tau agad-agad. Mi-match da ka at luwan ming temporary chat room. Mag-chat anonymous muna. Idagdag bilang Friend nung buri mu.
randomChat.saveGuard: Ing human-to-human chats lang maliaring i-save
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Ing age range lang mi-store (e ali ing exact date of birth). Gamitan ini ba maging reasonable ing Random Chat pairings. Ba mag-match kang tau (ali lang RiaBot), i-set ing age band mu king Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: I-set ing age range mu king Profile → Age & Random Chat ba mag-match kang tau.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ba mag-match kang tau (ali lang RiaBot), i-set ing age band mu king Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Mag-meet kang bayung tau agad-agad, o pili kang mag-chat kang Ria.
randomChat.setAge: I-set ing age range mu king Profile → Age & Random Chat ba mag-match kang tau.
